$comment: Example gRPC exchange: RegisterPolicy request and response. See RFC-MACP-0012 Section 7.
description: Registers a supermajority voting policy for Decision Mode sessions.

policy_descriptor.description: Supermajority voting with 2/3 threshold and quorum of 3 participants
